ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each school (e.g., 01M539) */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school (e.g., New Explorations into Science, Technology and Math High School) */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the school is located (e.g., Manhattan) */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code of the school (e.g., M022) */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the school (e.g., 111 Columbia Street) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located (e.g., Manhattan) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located (e.g., NY) */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the school (e.g., 10002) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  "resid_index" REAL /* Residency index of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_building_code FOREIGN KEY ("building_code") REFERENCES building_codes ("building_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the school_id in the schools table */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of Black students in the school */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students in the school */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students in the school */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of students from other ethnic groups in the school */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of White students in the school */,
  "percent_low_income" REAL /* Percentage of students from low-income families */,
  "percent_english_learners" REAL /* Percentage of English learners */,
  "percent_special_education" REAL /* Percentage of students in special education */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sat_scores" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the school_id in the schools table */,
  "avg_score_math" INTEGER /* Average SAT math score for the school */,
  "avg_score_reading" INTEGER /* Average SAT reading score for the school */,
  "avg_score_writing" INTEGER /* Average SAT writing score for the school */,
  "avg_score_total" INTEGER /* Average total SAT score for the school */,
  "num_test_takers" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the SAT */,
  "median_score_math" INTEGER /* Median SAT math score */,
  "median_score_reading" INTEGER /* Median SAT reading score */,
  "median_score_writing" INTEGER /* Median SAT writing score */,
  "median_score_total" INTEGER /* Median total SAT score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sat_testing" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the school_id in the schools table */,
  "percent_tested" REAL /* Percentage of students tested for SAT in the school */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "num_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the SAT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_categories" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the school_id in the schools table */,
  "black_hispanic_majority" TEXT /* Indicates whether the school has a Black/Hispanic majority (yes/no) */,
  "percent_black_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Black and Hispanic students combined */,
  "urban_rural_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the school is in an urban or rural area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough (e.g., Manhattan) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the borough */,
  "average_education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of residents in the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_codes" (
  "building_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building code */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code (e.g., M022) */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., traditional, modern) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last major renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, educator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
